title: learn-claude-code
desc: A minimal Claude Code clone built from scratch to explore the core mechanics of a CLI-based AI Agent — including tool use, skills, subagents, background tasks, and agent-swarms.
desc_zh: 从零实现的最小 Claude Code，深入探索 CLI-Agent 的核心机制，涵盖工具调用、Skills 接入、Subagents、后台任务执行与 Agent-Teams 等特性。

title: LLM Fine-Tuning Platform (Backend)
desc: Backend service for a lab-grade LLM fine-tuning platform (similar to Volcano Engine / Alibaba Cloud Bailian). Built with Flask + MongoDB, supporting model inference, fine-tuning task management, dataset versioning, and Prompt template management.
desc_zh: 实验室 LLM 微调平台的后端服务，类似火山方舟、阿里云百炼。基于 Flask + MongoDB 构建，支持模型推理与微调任务管理、训练生命周期追踪、数据集版本管理及 Prompt 模板管理。

title: WebPractice Vitamin
desc: A modern web practice platform showcasing responsive design, interactive UI components, and modern web development techniques.
desc_zh: 这是一个前后端分离项目，后端采用 Spring Boot + MyBatis，前端为 React。业务围绕“时间胶囊/漂流胶囊/弹幕胶囊”展开。
